hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.py ]]; then uvx ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && uvx ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */plan-3/*.md ]]; then echo '⚠️ plan-3 Markdown 已更新,记得重跑对应 _build_pdf_*.py 重新生成 PDF'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(rm|cp|mv|truncate|>).*(\xe2\x9c\x96|\xf0\x9f\x93\x85|\xf0\x9f\x8d\xb4|\xf0\x9f\x97\xba|\xf0\x9f\x92\xb0|\xf0\x9f\x9a\x97).*\.md'; then echo 'BLOCK: 源方案 .md 文件不允许批量操作,请用 Edit 精准修改'; exit 2; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.pdf ]]; then echo 'BLOCK: PDF 是生成产物,请修改对应 .md 后重跑 _build_pdf_*.py'; exit 2; fi

ls -lh /tmp/xinjiang*.html 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $9, $5}' | while read f s; do echo "  $f ($s)"; done; if ls /tmp/xinjiang*.html 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -q .; then echo '⚠️ /tmp 下还有 HTML 中间产物,请 rm /tmp/xinjiang*.html 清理'; fi
